ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., GPU, CPU) */,
  "memory_capacity" INTEGER /* Memory capacity of the device in MB */,
  "compute_capability" TEXT /* Compute capability of the device (e.g., 8.6, 7.5) */,
  "multi_processor_count" INTEGER /* Number of multi-processors on the device */,
  "max_threads_per_block" INTEGER /* Maximum number of threads per block */,
  "max_shared_memory_per_block" INTEGER /* Maximum shared memory per block in bytes */,
  "max_grid_size" INTEGER /* Maximum grid size in the x-axis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "kernels" (
  "kernel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each kernel */,
  "kernel_name" TEXT /* Name of the kernel */,
  "kernel_type" TEXT /* Type of the kernel (e.g., CUDA, OpenCL) */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device on which the kernel is executed */,
  "num_blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks in the kernel launch */,
  "num_threads_per_block" INTEGER /* Number of threads per block in the kernel launch */,
  "shared_memory_size" INTEGER /* Shared memory size used by the kernel in bytes */,
  "local_memory_size" INTEGER /* Local memory size used by the kernel in bytes */,
  "register_count" INTEGER /* Register count used by the kernel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("kernel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_kernels_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "kernel_launches" (
  "launch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each launch */,
  "kernel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the kernel being launched */,
  "launch_type" TEXT /* Type of the launch (e.g., global, shared) */,
  "grid_dim_x" INTEGER /* Grid dimension in the x-axis */,
  "grid_dim_y" INTEGER /* Grid dimension in the y-axis */,
  "grid_dim_z" INTEGER /* Grid dimension in the z-axis */,
  "block_dim_x" INTEGER /* Block dimension in the x-axis */,
  "block_dim_y" INTEGER /* Block dimension in the y-axis */,
  "block_dim_z" INTEGER /* Block dimension in the z-axis */,
  "dynamic_shared_memory_size" INTEGER /* Dynamic shared memory size allocated in bytes */,
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stream on which the kernel is launched */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("launch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_kernel_launches_kernel_id FOREIGN KEY ("kernel_id") REFERENCES kernels ("kernel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_kernel_launches_launch_type FOREIGN KEY ("launch_type") REFERENCES launch_types ("launch_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "execution_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each profile */,
  "launch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the launch being profiled */,
  "start_time" INTEGER /* Start time of the execution */,
  "end_time" INTEGER /* End time of the execution */,
  "execution_time" INTEGER /* Total execution time */,
  "memory_usage" INTEGER /* Memory usage during execution in MB */,
  "occupancy" REAL /* Occupancy of the kernel execution (0.0 - 1.0) */,
  "launch_latency" INTEGER /* Launch latency of the kernel execution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_execution_profiles_launch_id FOREIGN KEY ("launch_id") REFERENCES kernel_launches ("launch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "memory_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each memory configuration */,
  "launch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the launch using this memory configuration */,
  "shared_memory" INTEGER /* Shared memory allocated in bytes */,
  "local_memory_per_thread" INTEGER /* Local memory per thread in bytes */,
  "local_memory_total" INTEGER /* Total local memory in bytes */,
  "constants_memory" INTEGER /* Constant memory allocated in bytes */,
  "texture_memory" INTEGER /* Texture memory allocated in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_memory_configs_launch_id FOREIGN KEY ("launch_id") REFERENCES kernel_launches ("launch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, data scientist, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" INTEGER /* Time when the user accessed the platform */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "kernel_names" (
  "name_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each kernel name */,
  "kernel_name" TEXT /* Short name of the kernel */,
  "long_kernel_name" TEXT /* Long name of the kernel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("name_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_kernel_names_kernel_name FOREIGN KEY ("kernel_name") REFERENCES kernels ("kernel_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "contexts" (
  "context_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each context */,
  "context_name" TEXT /* Name of the context */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device on which the context is executed */,
  "context_flags" INTEGER /* Flags indicating the context type (e.g., CUDA, OpenCL) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("context_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contexts_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "streams" (
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stream */,
  "stream_name" TEXT /* Name of the stream */,
  "context_id" INTEGER /* ID of the context in which the stream is executed */,
  "stream_flags" INTEGER /* Flags indicating the stream type (e.g., default, priority) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stream_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_streams_context_id FOREIGN KEY ("context_id") REFERENCES contexts ("context_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "correlation_ids" (
  "correlation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each correlation ID */,
  "launch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the launch using this correlation ID */,
  "global_pid" INTEGER /* Global process ID associated with the correlation ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("correlation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correlation_ids_launch_id FOREIGN KEY ("launch_id") REFERENCES kernel_launches ("launch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "launch_types" (
  "launch_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each launch type */,
  "launch_type" TEXT /* Type of the launch (e.g., global, shared) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("launch_type_id")
)
